other_observers: Georgia Doyle, Cole Wild; Found by Georgia Doyle, identified by Cole Wild
specific_location: Intersection of County Road 9 and County Road 32, southeast corner
description: Large long-legged shorebird with mottled buffy brown plumage and a long recurved bicolored bill (pink on basal half, blackish on terminal half).Behaviors: Feeding by poking long bill into mud while wading in shallow waterCall: NonePlumage: Adult
